title: Reprisal Universe

notes:
All seems to work fine, after a crash at the first startup. We can't change keyboard shortcut.
The game is in qwerty, if you need an auto switch to something like azerty: right click on the game -> Properties -> STARTUP -> setxkbmap us && %command% && setxkbmap fr
You need to change fr to your xkb layout, here it's for french keyboard.
title: Reprisal Universe
